text.div:
Generated Narrative: ImplementationGuide ch.fhir.ig.ch-emr

CH_EMR

The official URL for this implementation guide is: 

http://fhir.ch/ig/ch-emr/ImplementationGuide/ch.fhir.ig.ch-emr

FHIR Implementation Guide for the Swiss Electronic Emergency Record

name: CH_EMR
title: CH EMR (R4)
description: FHIR Implementation Guide for the Swiss Electronic Emergency Record

resource.name: Advance Directive Type
resource.description: Types of advance directives and emergency medical orders.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Advance Directive DocumentReference
resource.description: Reference to advance directives and emergency medical

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Body Structure
resource.description: Structured anatomical location of an implant in the Emergency Record. Carries an unlateralised body site in `location` and the laterality (or other directional qualifier) in `locationQualifier`.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Bundle
resource.description: Bundle profile for Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Composition
resource.description: Swiss Emergency Record based on International Patient Summary

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Device
resource.description: Device profile for implants in the Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Device Use Statement
resource.description: Use of an implanted device in the Emergency Record. The `bodySite` CodeableConcept may carry the ChEmrBodyStructureReference extension to link to a `ChEmrBodyStructure` for structured anatomy + laterality.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record DocumentReference
resource.description: DocumentReference profile for information on documents in the Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Medication Statement
resource.description: Medication Statement for the Swiss Emergency Record. Captures a medication the patient is taking with a treatment reason, a dose quantity, and a dosing schedule expressed using the CH EMED dosage pattern.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Observation Disability
resource.description: Observation profile for cognitive disability in the Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Observation Resuscitation Status
resource.description: Observation profile for documenting the patient's resuscitation (code) status.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Physical Disability Observation
resource.description: Observation profile for physical disability in the Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record RelatedPerson
resource.description: RelatedPerson profile for emergency contacts and family members in the Emergency Record.

resource.name: CH Emergency Record Risk to Healthcare Personnel
resource.description: Risk to healthcare personnel emanating from the patient — typically a communicable / infectious-disease condition or another patient-side circumstance that healthcare personnel need to be aware of for their own safety when treating the patient in an emergency context.

resource.name: CH EMR Body Structure Reference
resource.description: Links a CodeableConcept body site to a BodyStructure resource carrying structured anatomy and laterality. Used where the FHIR UV bodySite extension is not allowed by its context list.

resource.name: CH EMR MRI Safety Status
resource.description: Permitted values for the MRI safety status property of a device, per ASTM F2503: MR Safe, MR Conditional, MR Unsafe.

resource.name: CH EMR MRI Safety Status
resource.description: Safety classification of a medical device in the magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) environment. Semantics aligned with ASTM F2503 (Standard Practice for Marking Medical Devices and Other Items for Safety in the Magnetic Resonance Environment). Defined locally because SNOMED CT International does not currently publish dedicated qualifier-value concepts for these classifications.

resource.name: Clinical Document Types
resource.description: Value Set for clinical document types

resource.name: Cognitive disability types
resource.description: Value set for the types of cognitive disabilities based on SNOMED CT.

resource.name: European Commission UDI Jurisdiction
resource.description: UDI jurisdiction for the European Commission (republished from the FHIR Device documentation).

resource.name: GS1 Device Identifiers
resource.description: GS1 device identifier namespace recognised as a UDI issuer (republished from the FHIR Device documentation).

resource.name: Implant Type
resource.description: Codes for implant types

resource.name: Physical disability types
resource.description: Value sets for the types of disabilities

resource.name: Resuscitation status
resource.description: Coded resuscitation status values based on SNOMED CT, including all descendants of 304251008 (Resuscitation status).

resource.name: Risk to Healthcare Personnel
resource.description:
SNOMED CT concepts that may indicate a risk to healthcare personnel emanating from the patient.
Includes selected children of the Infectious disease hierarchy whose descendants are person-to-person transmissible — viral, bacterial, sexually transmitted, respiratory, healthcare-associated and parasitic disease — plus an aggressive behavior finding.
Branches that do not pose a meaningful staff-transmission risk (anatomical-location infections, post-procedural / device-associated infections, sepsis variants, congenital and perinatal infections, plant / Microspora / Oomycota / fish infections, and the like) are excluded.
